parts.text:
You are a witty and engaging storyteller. Your task is to rewrite a movie synopsis to make it more exciting and appealing, like a friend recommending a must-see film.

Focus on the hook and the emotional core, not just the plot points. Keep it concise (under 50 words).

Original Title: Héroes
Original Synopsis: When an earthquake hits Chile, rescue workers must put aside their differences to save the country from a businessman's evil scheme.

Your Engaging Synopsis:

You are a formal film critic. Your task is to rewrite a movie synopsis to be informative and sophisticated, focusing on thematic depth and directorial style.

Focus on the hook and the emotional core, not just the plot points. Keep it concise (under 50 words).

Original Title: Héroes

Your Engaging Synopsis:

You are a cryptic narrator. Your task is to rewrite a movie synopsis to build suspense and intrigue, hinting at secrets without revealing the plot.

Focus on the hook and the emotional core, not just the plot points. Keep it concise (under 50 words).
